memoryArtifacts.headline: Oslo Monument to Harald
memoryArtifacts.description: Monument to Harald Sigurdsson at Harald Hardrådes plass in Gamlebyen, Oslo, Norway. Relief by Lars Utne 1905.

popularStory.headline: Harald Sigurdsson
popularStory.description:
Harald Hardrada - The Last Great Viking Ruler

Harald Sigurdsson, or Harald Hardrada as he is better known, is sometimes referred to as ‘the last Viking ruler’. Hardrada roughly translates to ‘hard ru …

zh.lifeSummary: 當Harald "Hardråde" Sigurdsson於1015年10月30日出生在挪威布斯克呂郡林格利可時，他的父親Sigurd Syr King of Ringeringe46歲，母親Åsta Astrid Gudbrandsdatter of Uplands, Queen of Norway45歲。他於1044年與Elisabeth Ellisif Yaroslavna of Kiev在蘇聯烏克蘭Київська областьКиїв結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和6個女兒的父母。他在艾歐洛斯堪的納維亞被列為viking king。他去世於1066年9月25日在英國越可爾斯坦福 布里奇享年50歲，埋葬在挪威奧-特洛德拉格特洛德海姆。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Harald "Hardråde" Sigurdsson于1015年10月30日出生在挪威布斯克呂郡林格利可时，他的父亲Sigurd Syr King of Ringeringe46岁，母亲Åsta Astrid Gudbrandsdatter of Uplands, Queen of Norway45岁。他于1044年与Elisabeth Ellisif Yaroslavna of Kiev在苏联乌克兰Київська областьКиїв结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和6个女儿的父母。他在艾歐洛斯堪的納維亞被列为viking king。他去世于1066年9月25日在英国越可爾斯坦福 布里奇享年50岁，埋葬在挪威奧-特洛德拉格特洛德海姆。

nameMeanings.name: Sigurdsson
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Scandinavian Erik, Arni, Bjorn, Sig.
Americanized form (and a very rare Swedish variant) of Swedish Sigurdsson: patronymic from the personal name Sigurd, Old Norse Sigurthr, composed of the elements sig ‘victory’ + varthr ‘guardian’.
Americanized form of Norwegian Sigurdsen, a cognate of 1 above.

nameMeanings.name: Harald
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From the Old Norse personal name Haraldr, meaning ‘army leader’, cognate with English Harold.

historicEvents.title: Canut the Great
historicEvents.description: As Aethelred, King of England died, his son, Edmund Ironside devised a truce with Danish King Canute. The truce divided the kingdom between the two but Edmund died shortly after and became King of England. Several years later, he also became king of Denmark.

historicEvents.title: England Divided
historicEvents.description: King Canute died in 1035 and England was divided between his three sons. His son Sweyn received Norway, Harthacanute received Denmark, and Harold Harefoot received North England.

historicEvents.title: Battle of Hastings
historicEvents.description: Battle of Hastings was fought between the Norman-French army and the battle-wary English army on October 14, 1066. Duke William of Normandy believed he was the rightful king rather than Harold, who had been crowned king several months earlier. Harold was killed in battle and William was crowned king on Christmas Day 1066.

en.lifeSummary: When Harald "Hardråde" Sigurdsson was born on 30 October 1015, in Ringerike, Buskerud, Norway, his father, Sigurd Syr King of Ringeringe, was 46 and his mother, Åsta Astrid Gudbrandsdatter of Uplands, Queen of Norway, was 45. He married Elisabeth Ellisif Yaroslavna of Kiev in 1044, in Kyiv, Kyiv, Ukraine, Soviet Union. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 6 daughters. His occupation is listed as viking king in Scandinavia, Europe. He died on 25 September 1066, in Stamford Bridge, Yorkshire, England, at the age of 50, and was buried in Trondheim, Sør-Trøndelag, Norway.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Harald "Hardråde" Sigurdsson est né le 30 octobre 1015, à Ringerike, Buskerud, Norvège, son père, Sigurd Syr King of Ringeringe, avait 46 ans et sa mère, Åsta Astrid Gudbrandsdatter of Uplands, Queen of Norway, avait 45 ans. Il a épousé Elisabeth Ellisif Yaroslavna of Kiev en 1044, à Kyyiv, Kyiv, Ukraine, Union soviétique. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 6 filles. Sa profession de son indiquée est viking king à Scandinavie, Europe. Il est décédé le 25 septembre 1066, à Stamford Bridge, Everwyck, Angleterre, à l’âge de 50 ans, et a été enterré à Trondheim, Sør-Trøndelag, Norvège.

de.lifeSummary: Als Harald "Hardråde" Sigurdsson am 30. Oktober 1015 in Ringerike, Buskerud, Norwegen geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sigurd Syr King of Ringeringe 46 und seine Mutter Åsta Astrid Gudbrandsdatter of Uplands, Queen of Norway 45. Er hat 1044 in Kiew, Kyiv, Ukraine, Sowjetunion Elisabeth Ellisif Yaroslavna of Kiev geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 6 Töchter. sein Beruf ist als viking king in Skandinavien, Europa aufgeführt. Er starb am 25. September 1066 im Alter von 50 Jahren in Stamford Bridge, Yorkshire, England und wurde in Trondheim, Sør-Trøndelag, Norwegen begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Harald "Hardråde" Sigurdsson è nato il il 30 ottobre 1015 nel Ringerike, Buskerud, Norvegia, il suo padre, Sigurd Syr King of Ringeringe, aveva 46 anni e il suo madre, Åsta Astrid Gudbrandsdatter of Uplands, Queen of Norway, aveva 45 anni. Lui sposato Elisabeth Ellisif Yaroslavna of Kiev nel 1044, nel Kyyiv, Kyiv, Ucraina, Sowjetunion. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 6 figlie. La sua occupazione è indicata come viking king nel Scandinavia, Europa. Morì il 25 settembre 1066, nel Stamford Bridge, Yorkshire, England, all'età di 50 anni, e fu sepolto a Trondheim, Sør-Trøndelag, Norvegia.

ja.lifeSummary: Harald "Hardråde" Sigurdssonが1015年10月30日にノルウェーブスケルドリンジャーアイクで生まれた時，父Sigurd Syr King of Ringeringeは46歳，母Åsta Astrid Gudbrandsdatter of Uplands, Queen of Norwayは45歳であった。1044年にソビエト連邦ウクライナКиївська областьКиївでElisabeth Ellisif Yaroslavna of Kievと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と6人の娘の親であった。ヨーロッパスカンディナヴィアでの職業はviking kingと記録されている。彼は1066年9月25日にイギリスヨークシュアイアスタムフォード ブリッジで50歳で死去し，ノルウェースoル-トルoンデラグトロンドヘイムにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Harald "Hardråde" Sigurdsson(이)가 1015년 10월 30일 노르웨이 버스케루드 링릭에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sigurd Syr King of Ringeringe(은)는 46세였고, 그의 어머니 Åsta Astrid Gudbrandsdatter of Uplands, Queen of Norway(은)는 45세였다. 그는 1044년 소련 우크라이나 Київська область Київ에서 Elisabeth Ellisif Yaroslavna of Kiev(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 여섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그의 직업은 우럽 스캔딘아비아에서 viking king이었다. 그는 1066년 9월 25일 영국 요르크실르 스타퍼드 브리지에서 50세의 나이로 사망했으며 노르웨이 스o-트o들라그 트론드하임에 묻혔다.

pt.30 October 1015–25 September 1066: 30 de outubro de 1015–25 de setembro de 1066
pt.Between 7 September 1066 and 6 October 1: de 7 de setembro de 1066 a 6 de outubro de 1066
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Harald "Hardråde" Sigurdsson nasceu em 30 de outubro de 1015, em Ringerike, Buskerud, Noruega, seu pai, Sigurd Syr King of Ringeringe, tinha 46 anos e sua mãe, Åsta Astrid Gudbrandsdatter of Uplands, Queen of Norway, tinha 45 anos. Ele casou-se com Elisabeth Ellisif Yaroslavna of Kiev em 1044, em Kyyiv, Kyiv, Ucrânia, Sowjetunion. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 6 filhas. Sua profissão aparece como viking king em Escandinávia, Europa. Ele faleceu em 25 de setembro de 1066, em Stamford Bridge, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, com 50 anos, e foi sepultado em Trondheim, Sør-Trøndelag, Noruega.

ru.Kyiv: Киев, Киевская область, Украина, Советский Союз
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Harald "Hardråde" Sigurdsson родился 30 октября 1015 г. в местности рингираик, бускируд, Норвегия, его отцу по имени Sigurd Syr King of Ringeringe было 46 лет, а матери, которую звали Åsta Astrid Gudbrandsdatter of Uplands, Queen of Norway, 45. Он женился на женщине по имени Elisabeth Ellisif Yaroslavna of Kiev в 1044 г. в местности Киев, Киевская область, Украина, Советский Союз. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 6 дочерей.  Он работал по профессии viking king в местности Скандинавия, Европа. Он умер 25 сентября 1066 г. в местности стамфорд бридж, еркшир, Англия в возрасте 50 лет и был похоронен в местности трондхим, сoр-трoнделаг, Норвегия.

es.Between 7 September 1066 and 6 October 1: desde 7 de septiembre de 1066 hasta 6 de octubre de 1066
es.lifeSummary: Cuando Harald "Hardråde" Sigurdsson nació el 30 de octubre de 1015, en Ringerike, Buskerud, Noruega, su papá, Sigurd Syr King of Ringeringe, tenía 46 años y su mamá, Åsta Astrid Gudbrandsdatter of Uplands, Queen of Norway, tenía 45 años. Se casó con Elisabeth Ellisif Yaroslavna of Kiev en 1044, en Kyyiv, Kyiv, Ucrania, Unión Soviética. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 6 hijas. Su ocupación registrada era viking king en Escandinavia, Europa. Murió el 25 de septiembre de 1066, en Stamford Bridge, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 50 años, y fue sepultado en Trondheim, Sør-Trøndelag, Noruega.
